card.title: Full Lucky Aura Card
card.message: Warm presence can turn a small exchange into a memorable one.
card.outfit: Use one playful accent and keep the rest effortless.
card.beauty: Let one feature catch light while the rest stays natural.
card.social: Join the first friendly circle and ask what made their week brighter.
card.ritual: Smile at yourself once before you enter the room.
card.avoid: Avoid performing for people who are not meeting your energy.
card.caption: Today I am carrying golden comet aura.
